name: 360 Turf
address: 5141 Batavia Elba Townline Rd, Batavia, NY 14020
about: 360 Turf specializes in synthetic grass solutions and custom golf installations. They design and build tour-quality putting greens, custom golf simulators, and various recreational surfaces like bocce courts and pet grass areas for both homeowners and professional facilities. Their golf simulators are customized to fit available space and budget, using what they describe as the finest simulator equipment and software.
why_golfers_like_it: Custom-built simulators designed to fit any available space
Tour-quality putting greens and golf solutions
Uses the finest simulator equipment and software for accuracy and quality

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on-site
No mention of alcohol service on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Trackman logo is present on the website, indicating potential use

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, but it is standard practice to bring your own clubs for a personal and optimal golfing experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention a kitchen or bar service. It appears to be BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverages) for alcohol, with no specific food service mentioned.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round typically take?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific information on the duration of an 18-hole round, but it can vary depending on the simulator software and number of players.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers pet grass areas and artificial lawns, and their focus on family-friendly solutions suggests a welcoming environment for children.
